easy_signal_noise.reason: Initial diagnosis: inspect the most unhealthy service.
Rollback suspected bad deploy on the true root cause.

medium_hidden_dependency.reason: Investigate likely upstream dependency causing payment failures.
Recover hidden root cause at the database layer.
Stabilize the database replica after rollback.
Recover downstream worker if still unhealthy.

hard_multi_incident.reason: Diagnose the most critical service first.
Rollback the primary bad deploy causing widespread impact.
Reduce payment queue overload to contain cascading damage.
Scale notification processing to drain backlog.
Optional stabilization if gateway remains critically degraded.
